summary.intent: Implement a CrmService trait in the moltis service-traits crate (CHA-12), including a NoopCrmService stub and wiring into the Services struct, then address code review feedback in a rework run.
summary.outcome: Rework completed: fixed build-breaking missing `crm` field in GatewayServices and graphql integration test, added `params` to `contacts_list`, added `get_by_external` methods, and fixed a broken rustdoc link. All quality checks passed (fmt, clippy, 4 tests).

repo: service-traits crate uses an untyped RPC dispatch pattern: all trait methods take `params: Value` and return `ServiceResult<Value>` — no concrete domain types cross the crate boundary.

Every service trait requires three components: the trait itself, a NoopXxxService stub (lists return `json!([])`, mutations return `Err('xxx not configured')`), and wiring into the `Services` struct + `Default` impl.
GatewayServices in crates/gateway/src/services.rs has a `noop()` constructor and a `to_services()` method — both must be updated when adding a new field to `Services`.
The gateway crate gates the real CRM implementation behind a `crm` feature flag; the trait + noop live unconditionally in service-traits.
The moltis-web CSS error in `cargo check` is a pre-existing issue unrelated to this work.

code.finding: GatewayServices::to_services() constructs Services struct directly — must be updated whenever a new field is added to Services.
build_mock_services() constructs Services struct directly — must be updated whenever a new field is added to Services.
Doc comment referencing [moltis_crm::CrmStore] won't resolve because service-traits has no dependency on moltis-crm; use plain text or intra-doc links only within the crate.

workflow: The Stokowski orchestrator injects lifecycle context (issue state, prior workpad, review comments) into agent prompts via HTML comments — agents should append to workpad, never overwrite.
Linear API credentials are not available in the agent environment; the orchestrator posts comments on behalf of agents.
Scoping cargo check to specific crates (`-p crate-name`) is faster and avoids surfacing pre-existing errors in unrelated crates.

friction: Linear API key not available in the agent environment, preventing the code reviewer from posting its review comment directly — had to output inline instead.
Run 1 implementation passed its own quality checks (cargo check ✓) but failed to update downstream construction sites, causing a build break that was only caught in code review.
The MCP context-mode plugin was used for shell commands in some parts of the session but Bash tool in others — inconsistent tooling.
open_items: Real CrmService implementation in the gateway crate (behind the `crm` feature flag) is not yet built — only the trait + noop exist.
No API routes or RPC handlers for CRM exist in the gateway yet.
contacts_get_by_external and channels_get_by_external were added to the trait but have no real implementation path until the gateway impl is built.
interactions_get / interactions_update / interactions_delete were added (full CRUD) but the original issue only required list/add — the extra methods may never be needed.
